name: wuxian-lunhui
description: 无限轮回 - 像素风动作Roguelike游戏
author: 开发者

scripts.dev: concurrently "cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx electron electron/main.js"
scripts.build: node scripts/bump-version.js && node scripts/backup.js && vite build && node scripts/copy-assets.js && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: node scripts/bump-version.js && node scripts/backup.js && vite build && node scripts/copy-assets.js && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:portable:
node scripts/bump-version.js && node scripts/backup.js && cross-env PATH="C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\WINDOWS\System32;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;%PATH%" npm="C:\Program Files
odejs
pm.cmd" CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false vite build && cross-env PATH="C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\WINDOWS\System32;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;%PATH%" npm="C:\Program Files
odejs
pm.cmd" node scripts/copy-assets.js && cross-env PATH="C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\WINDOWS\System32;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;%PATH%" npm="C:\Program Files
odejs
pm.cmd" electron-builder --win portable
